stages.objective: Study fairness tradeoffs through current proxy scheduler behavior.
stages.goal: Interpret fairness evidence while lottery policy remains theory-focused.
stages.theory_detail: Lottery scheduling concepts are taught here; runtime challenge uses proxy fairness checks until lottery is implemented.

hints.concept: This lesson emphasizes proportional-share reasoning, even with current engine limits.
hints.explicit: Compare fairness metric and trace cadence to approximate expected lottery tradeoffs.

stages.objective: Diagnose fairness and completion under proxy policy conditions.
stages.goal: Pass current checks while explaining expected lottery behavior conceptually.

hints.concept: Fairness interpretation is meaningful only when workload completes.
hints.explicit: Run to completion and validate fairness-related checks before submit.

stages.objective: Apply tuning and evaluate fairness impact within limits.
stages.goal: Use bounded policy changes to improve fairness outcomes without regressions.

hints.nudge: Tune one parameter at a time.
hints.concept: Fairness tradeoffs are sensitive to scheduling configuration.
hints.explicit: Apply one policy change, rerun, and compare fairness plus completion.
